_comment: Golden-template Project field schema (gh-projects). Hand-built once on the golden-template Project (before any scaffold copy), then replicated to every scaffolded project via copyProjectV2. scaffold-repo uses this as the EXPECTED schema to diff the COPY against — it never re-PUTs an option list or iterationConfiguration without a prior diff. Every single-select option carries a `description` (what the option means relative to the field) and a `color` stored as the UPPERCASE projectsV2 enum; setup_board sends it at field create and lowercases the same name for the issue-type and issue-field APIs (their enum is identical but lowercase). No create API has an update, so recolor/rename existing options in the UI. COLOR IS RESERVED FOR SIGNAL: only risk/urgency/health fields are colored (Schedule health, Slippage, Blast radius, Blocked, Impact level, Priority, Status); descriptive/categorical fields (Size, Tier) are intentionally all-GRAY so the views aren't littered with color — do not 'helpfully' recolor them. Org Issue Fields (Priority/Start date/Target date) and Issue Types (Type) live OUTSIDE the project copy (see fields with home != project) and are ensured by scaffold against the org. Field display names avoid hyphens (e.g. 'Blast count', not 'Blast count') so they read cleanly as columns/pills; 'PM-ID' is the one exception — its hyphen mirrors the 'PM-####' value it holds.
_field_display_order_comment: Canonical global field order for the project (Settings -> Fields). There is no API to set field position (the REST fields API has no position attribute and no PATCH; verified 2026-03-10), so this is applied once by hand in the UI on the golden template and carried by copyProjectV2. It governs the field palette and any view that hasn't set its own column order; each view's own `fields` list in views.json overrides it per-view (purpose-first). Includes the native built-ins (Assignees / Parent issue / Sub-issues progress / Milestone) at their intended slots; Title stays pinned first by GitHub.

fields.name: Status
fields.purpose: Lifecycle stage of the work; the key board automation reads and writes

options.name: Backlog
options.description: Captured but not yet committed to.

options.name: Ready
options.description: Acceptance criteria complete and lead-gated — pull from here.

options.name: In Progress
options.description: A linked branch has been pushed; work is underway.

options.name: In Review
options.description: A non-draft PR is open against the issue.

options.name: On Staging
options.description: Merged to main and deployed to staging; the item stays open.

fields.name: Type
fields.purpose: Work taxonomy (org-wide Issue Type, not a project field)

options.name: Epic
options.description: A parent that splits into per-AC-group sub-issues.

fields.name: Size
fields.purpose: Appetite (not story points); suggested from the AC-group count

options.name: L
options.description: 4+ AC groups; large appetite — consider an Epic split.

fields.name: Tier
fields.purpose: Sets spec rigor: T1 light, T2 standard, T3 full rigor + a linked deep spec

options.name: T1
options.description: Trivial; light rigor; AC table only.

options.name: T3
options.description: Complex; full rigor + refine; a linked deep spec is required.

fields.name: Parent issue
fields.purpose: Epic grouping; feeds the sub-issue % rollup

fields.name: PM-ID
fields.purpose: Stable PM-#### identifier threading spec -> issue -> PR

fields.name: Spec
fields.purpose: Link to the T3 deep spec; empty for T1/T2

fields.name: Blocked
fields.purpose: Derived flag — does an open blocked-by dependency hold this item? Not hand-set

options.name: Blocked
options.description: At least one open blocked-by dependency (derived by lib/dag from the native edges).

fields.name: Priority
fields.purpose: P0-P3 urgency; orders the Ready queue (org Issue Field, shown as a project column on private projects)

fields.name: Target date
fields.purpose: Deadline; feeds Schedule health & Slippage (org Issue Field)

fields.name: Schedule health
fields.purpose: Rolled-up schedule status of the item

options.name: On track
options.description: Not past Target and not blocking a release.

options.name: At risk
options.description: Target is within the warning window, or a soft slip.

options.name: Blocked
options.description: Held by an open blocked-by dependency.

options.name: Overdue
options.description: Past Target date and still open.

fields.name: Slippage days
fields.purpose: Exact days past Target (unlocks Insights sum/avg and numeric sort)

fields.name: Blast radius
fields.purpose: How much this item blocks downstream work

options.name: Blocks many
options.description: Blocks two or more downstream items.

options.name: Blocks release
options.description: On the critical path to a release milestone.

fields.name: Blast count
fields.purpose: Number of downstream items blocked (Insights sum/sort)

fields.name: Impact level
fields.purpose: Deliberate impact call by the PM/lead

options.name: Release blocker
options.description: A release cannot ship without it.

fields.name: Decision needed
fields.purpose: The pending PM/lead decision on a stuck item

options.name: Reduce scope
options.description: Cut scope to hold the date.
